content:
:megaphone: Calling All Users of Verification-Aware Programming Languages!

Are you working with verification-aware programming languages or other formal methods tools? If so, we need your help!

As part of a research project, we're investigating how developers approach software verification with a quick 15-minute survey. Whether you use Dafny, Verus, Lean, Rocq, Agda, or other similar languages, your practical experience is incredibly valuable!

Click here to participate: http://bit.ly/3SjeFdm

Thank you!
